sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ الصَّلَاةُ عِمَادَ الدِّينِ، وَلَا يَكْتَمِلُ أَجْرُهَا إِلَّا بِإِتْمَامِ أَرْكَانِهَا وَخُشُوعِهَا كَمَا أَمَرَ الشَّرْعُ.
sentences.translation: Namaz se smatra stubom vjere, a njegova nagrada nije potpuna osim uz upotpunjavanje njegovih rukunova i skrušenosti (hušua) onako kako je propisano.
sentences.translationEn: Prayer is considered the pillar of religion, and its reward is not complete except by fulfilling its pillars and its humility (Khushu') as commanded by Sharia.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ رَأَى النَّبِيُّ ﷺ رَجُلًا يُصَلِّي وَلَا يُتِمُّ رُكُوعَهُ وَلَا سُجُودَهُ، فَقَالَ لَهُ: «ارْجِعْ فَصَلِّ فَإِنَّكَ لَمْ تُصَلِّ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْأَذَانِ، حَدِيثُ رَقْمِ ٧٥٧].
sentences.translation: Poslanik, s.a.v.s., je vidio čovjeka koji klanja a ne upotpunjava svoj ruku' niti sedždu, pa mu je rekao: 'Vrati se i klanjaj, jer ti nisi klanjao' [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o ezanu, hadis br. 757].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (PBUH) saw a man praying without completing his bowing or prostration, so he said to him: 'Go back and pray, for you have not prayed' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Adhan, Hadith No. 757].

sentences.arabic: يُشِيرُ هَذَا الْحَدِيثُ إِلَى أَهَمِّيَّةِ الطُّمَأْنِينَةِ، وَهِيَ السُّكُونُ فِي كُلِّ رُكْنٍ حَتَّى يَرْجِعَ كُلُّ فَقَارٍ إِلَى مَكَانِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj hadis ukazuje na važnost smirenosti (tumanine), a to je mirovanje u svakom rukunu dok se svaki pršljen ne vrati na svoje mjesto.
sentences.translationEn: This hadith points to the importance of tranquility (Tumaninah), which is stillness in every pillar until every vertebra returns to its place.

sentences.arabic: وَيُؤَكِّدُ الْإِمَامُ ابْنُ الْقَيِّمِ أَنَّ الصَّلَاةَ بِلَا خُشُوعٍ كَالْجَسَدِ بِلَا رُوحٍ، فَالْقَلْبُ يَجِبُ أَنْ يَكُونَ حَاضِرًا بَيْنَ يَدَيِ اللهِ.
sentences.translation: Imam Ibn el-Kajjim naglašava da je namaz bez skrušenosti poput tijela bez duše, jer srce mora biti prisutno pred Allahom.
sentences.translationEn: Imam Ibn al-Qayyim emphasizes that prayer without Khushu' is like a body without a soul, for the heart must be present before Allah.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الْمُحَافَظَةَ عَلَى الصَّلَاةِ فِي أَوْقَاتِهَا مَعَ إِسْبَاغِ الْوُضُوءِ تَنْهَى عَنِ الْفَحْشَاءِ وَالْمُنْكَرِ وَتُطَهِّرُ النَّفْسَ مِنَ الذُّنُوبِ.
sentences.translation: Čuvanje namaza u njegovim vremenima uz upotpunjavanje abdesta odvraća od razvrata i zla, te čisti dušu od grijeha.
sentences.translationEn: Maintaining prayer at its fixed times along with perfecting wudu prevents indecency and wrongdoing and purifies the soul from sins.

sentences.arabic: فَالصَّلَاةُ لَيْسَتْ حَرَكَاتٍ مُجَرَّدَةً، بَلْ هِيَ صِلَةٌ مُبَاشِرَةٌ بَيْنَ الْعَبْدِ وَخَالِقِهِ تَمْنَحُهُ السَّكِينَةَ وَالثَّبَاتَ فِي مُوَاجَهَةِ فِتَنِ الْحَيَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Namaz nisu samo puki pokreti, već direktna veza između roba i njegovog Stvoritelja koja mu daruje smirenost i postojanost u suočavanju sa životnim iskušenjima.
sentences.translationEn: Prayer is not merely abstract movements, but rather a direct connection between the servant and his Creator that grants him peace and steadfastness in the face of life's trials.
